proposal1.heroHeadline: Shida is losing 30 hours a month on proposals. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually creating proposals for graphic design clients takes hours. Automated, it's done in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Shida is facing ongoing losses that can be quantified and addressed.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Shida spends 30 hours monthly on proposal writing. That's 30 hours not spent on design projects or client acquisition.

problems.title: Revenue Leakage
problems.description: Every hour on proposals is an hour not billing clients. At $100/hour, this equals $3,000 monthly in potential revenue lost.

problems.title: Client Delays
problems.description: Manual proposals delay responses. This can lead to losing potential clients who expect quick turnarounds.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually created proposals risk inconsistent branding. This can dilute Shida's professional image and cost potential business.

problems.title: High Opportunity Cost
problems.description: Time spent drafting proposals could be used to enhance Shida's design portfolio, potentially attracting higher-paying clients.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: The team of four feels the strain of proposal deadlines. This stress can lead to burnout, affecting overall productivity and creativity.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the replacement for Shida's current proposal process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Current method: hours on manual drafting. System: complete proposals in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Current method: inconsistent manual branding. System: ensures every proposal is on-brand, every time.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Current method: no insight into client interactions. System: tracks proposal views and interactions, providing valuable client insights.

solutions.title: Integrated AI Chatbot
solutions.description: Current method: slow client Q&A handling. System: instant client queries resolution with an AI chatbot.

solutions.title: Scalable Solution
solutions.description: Current method: limited by manual capacity. System: scales with Shida's growth, handling more clients effortlessly.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Shida's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Shida around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Shida.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Brand with Shida's Expert Graphic Design Services.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a targeted approach to enhance Acme Corp's brand identity, maximizing conversion and customer engagement.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to brand inconsistencies and lack of engagement.

problems.title: Lackluster Branding
problems.description: Without a cohesive brand identity, Acme Corp loses up to 20% of potential customer interest. This results in diminished market presence.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is a missed revenue opportunity. Site bounce rates are currently at 60%.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing Materials
problems.description: Subpar marketing materials lead to a 15% drop in client acquisition rates. This directly affects your bottom line.

problems.title: Inconsistent Visuals
problems.description: Visual inconsistencies cost Acme Corp credibility, leading to a 10% decline in customer trust and loyalty.

problems.title: Outdated Graphics
problems.description: Outdated graphics result in a 25% decrease in user engagement on digital platforms, impacting overall sales.

problems.title: Low Social Media Impact
problems.description: Ineffective social media visuals contribute to a 30% underperformance in expected social media reach and engagement.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these problems, turning losses into opportunities for growth.

solutions.title: Comprehensive Brand Design
solutions.description: We create a cohesive brand identity that resonates with your target audience, strengthening market presence.

solutions.title: User-Centric Web Design
solutions.description: Enhancing user experience to reduce bounce rates and increase conversion, directly impacting revenue.

solutions.title: Engaging Marketing Collateral
solutions.description: Developing high-impact marketing materials to boost client acquisition and enhance brand image.

solutions.title: Dynamic Social Media Graphics
solutions.description: Creating vibrant and consistent visuals for social media to elevate engagement and brand visibility.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Shida's expertise in graphic design positions us as the ideal partner for Acme Corp's transformation.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: We have a history of delivering tangible results for our clients, enhancing their brand identities effectively.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our strategy is tailored to your specific needs, ensuring alignment with your business goals.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We employ cutting-edge design techniques to keep your brand ahead of the competition.

whyUsCards.title: Timely Delivery
whyUsCards.description: We meet deadlines without compromising quality, ensuring your projects are completed on schedule.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our dedicated team is committed to delivering exceptional results for Acme Corp.

team.name: Kenji Doshida
team.bio: Kenji leads strategy and client relationships with a focus on achieving measurable outcomes. He brings over a decade of experience in driving brand success.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Strategy
process.description: We begin by understanding your business and defining a strategic approach.

process.title: Design & Development
process.description: Our team develops design concepts that align with your brand goals.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: We bring the designs to life, ensuring functionality and aesthetics.

process.title: Review & Optimize
process.description: We review performance and make necessary adjustments for optimal results.

proposal2.pricingIntro: We offer investment options that align with your business goals.

pricing.name: Starter Package
pricing.description: Ideal for small-scale projects focused on foundational improvements.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Recommended for comprehensive brand enhancement and digital presence.

pricing.name: Enterprise Package
pricing.description: For large-scale projects aiming for significant market impact.

proposal2.ctaHeadline: Ready to Transform Acme Corp's Brand Identity?
proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's have a conversation about how we can help you achieve your business goals.

Our team of professionals will keep you informed and involved throughout the entire process. Consider us an extension of your own 'in-house' design department.
